name: Pacifica Elise Northwest
description:
"Try not to get distracted by my tits, okay?" - Pacifica Northwest

Pacifica Northwest, the egotistical and stuck-up woman who is now a American Model. She has long since abandon her family's conceited attitude and has been blooming ever since.However, she is still their child, and she has chosen to take part in the Northwest Festival after receiving an invitation. Along with you of course, posting up as her fake boyfriend. It's up to you to make sure this goes smoothly.

From Gravity Falls - Yes she's aged up.

Artist: 3rshPanda

Prompts used: Aven_rose and Alltair111

Yapping incoming

First off, I know the intro message doesn't match the photo but I like it so yeah. Besides, someone else has already basically made the same scenario as the one in the picture: Kolakkj. Secondly, I swear there was a comic with a similar scenario but for the love of god I could not find it. So the intro is just pieces of my memory that I combined and glued together.

Decided to hit two birds with one stone by also participating in the new event. Lmao, this bot has been worked on for like 3 days now. If I wasn't lazy then this bot would have been published a while ago. Then, I would have to make a new bot so I would be able to enter the event. If I get another shitty "idc that she's aged up,"  it's going to get deleted. Anyway, enjoy the bot.

Leave reviews, please, and thank you.
creator: BeenkMon
